prompt: Check if the documentation is still correct in PR #321 on onprofit-services-api (feat(ON-1413): Add warm transfer data to post-call webhook payload). I want to make sure the API docs and docstrings match the new webhook payload.

assertions.text: Report references specific files changed in the PR diff, not generic advice
Report examines docstrings and comments within files that are part of the PR diff
Report searches for references to changed code outside the diff (READMEs, docs/, other source files)
Findings are organized by severity or importance (e.g. critical/stale/missing)
Proposed fixes include actual code/text changes, not just vague suggestions
Does not flag documentation that is actually still correct after the changes
Checks more than one doc type (docstrings, markdown, inline comments, config comments, etc.)
